title: True Positive: Encoded PowerShell
learning_objectives: Recognize why encoded PowerShell stands out in endpoint telemetry
Correlate a suspicious parent process with a child process
Practice turning endpoint evidence into a short triage conclusion
triage_questions: What process behavior caused the alert?
What does the parent-child process relationship tell you?
Would you treat this as suspicious enough to escalate?
evidence_to_check: The suspicious child process from PowerShell
The user and host involved in both events
hints: Start with the PowerShell command line itself.
Then look at what launched after it.
This case is meant to feel like straightforward suspicious endpoint behavior.
escalation_guidance: Escalate as suspicious PowerShell execution with a follow-on child process, and include the host, user, and command-line evidence.
